strengths: 15+ years in software engineering with diverse technical stack (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js, etc.)

response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum 15 years of experience requirement and demonstrates strong engineering leadership (TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions). However, there is no explicit evidence of AI/ML product development, cloud platform strategy, or customer advisory roles—critical for this role. The AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is relevant but insufficient to confirm deep AI expertise. Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is a plus but not directly aligned with cloud/AI strategy.
